name: The Madison
plot: A New York family's life unravels after a tragedy; they process their grief while vacationing in rural Montana, where they explore human connection amid their profound sorrow.

name: Detective Hole
plot: A brilliant but troubled detective, Harry Hole, hunts a serial killer while battling a corrupt adversary, Tom Waaler, as they navigate ethical gray areas, with Harry determined to bring the criminal to justice.

name: Harry Potter
plot: Plot unknown.

name: Scarpetta

imageCaption: Jamie Lee Curtis, Nicole Kidman, Simon Baker, Bobby Cannavale, and Ariana DeBose in Scarpetta (2026)

name: Love Story
plot: Explores the undeniable chemistry, whirlwind courtship and high-profile marriage of one of the most iconic couples of the 20th century, John F. Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette.

name: Rooster
plot: A comedy revolving around an author's intricate bond with his daughter, set against the backdrop of a college campus.

name: Young Sherlock
plot: A disgraced, young Sherlock Holmes finds himself wrapped up in a murder case that threatens his liberty. His first ever case unravels a globe-trotting conspiracy, culminating in an explosive showdown that changes his life forever.

name: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
plot: A century before GOT, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his squire, Egg, wandered through Westeros while the Targaryen dynasty ruled the Iron Throne, and dragons were still remembered. Great destinies and enemies await the incomparable friends.
imageCaption: Dexter Sol Ansell and Peter Claffey in A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms (2026)

name: Marshals
plot: Ex-Navy SEAL Kayce Dutton leaves the Yellowstone ranch to work with an elite U.S. Marshals team.

name: Bait
plot: A struggling actor on the cusp of landing the role of a lifetime finds himself thrust into a full-blown existential crisis and conspiracy at the same time.

name: Imperfect Women
plot: Follows an investigation that dives deep into the murder of a wealthy woman and all the dark secrets uncovered about her life.

name: Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
plot: A paraplegic ex-jockey joins forces with an outlaw to compete in the first cross-continental horse race across North America in the 1800s.

name: Scrubs
plot: JD and Turk scrub in together after a long break. Medicine and interns have evolved, but their friendship remains strong. New and familiar faces at Sacred Heart bring laughs, emotion, and unexpected moments.

name: Dutton Ranch
plot: Beth Dutton and Rip Wheeler fight to survive on their cherished 7,000-acre ranch amid tough times and stiff competition, while ensuring young Carter becomes the man he's supposed to be.

name: The Other Bennet Sister
plot: Mary leaves her sisters' shadows to find herself, embarking on a journey from Meryton to London and the Lake District. Her quest for independence leads to an unexpected love story in Regency-era England.

name: Memory of a Killer
plot: When hitman Angelo is hit with early onset Alzheimer's, his worlds collide, putting his family in danger.

name: 56 Days
plot: After a chance supermarket encounter, Oliver and Ciara embark on an intense relationship. When a savagely murdered corpse surfaces 56 days later, the investigation delves into their turbulent love story, revealing grim secrets.

name: How to Get to Heaven from Belfast
plot: Three lifelong friends reunite after the death of an old classmate turns a wake into a dark mystery. They embark on a thrilling adventure across Ireland, piecing together enigmatic truths amid complicated lives.

name: Stranger Things: Tales from '85
plot: Set in Hawkins, Indiana, in the winter of 1985, Eleven and her friends unravel a paranormal mystery terrorizing their town.
imageCaption: Jolie Hoang-Rappaport, Brooklyn Davey Norstedt, Luca Diaz, Braxton Quinney, Benjamin Plessala, and Elisha Williams in Stranger Things: Tales from '85 (2026)

name: The Beauty
plot: Partners Cooper Madsen and Jordan Bennett investigate "the Beauty" STD causing aesthetic effects but proving lethal, evading corrupt officials and a mercenary targeting them amidst a suspected government conspiracy.
imageCaption: The Beauty (2026)

name: Vladimir
plot: A woman's life spirals as she develops an obsession with her alluring coworker. Her determination to make her fantasies real leads to dark, humorous and complicated situations.

name: RJ Decker
plot: Ex-con photographer RJ Decker becomes a PI in South Florida, solving strange cases with help from his journalist ex, her cop wife, and an enigmatic woman from his past who may help or destroy him.

name: CIA
plot: Follows a partnership between a C.I.A Case Officer and an F.B.I. Special Agent who work together on a clandestine task force to prevent domestic terrorism in New York.

name: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
plot: Young cadets train to become Starfleet officers as they deal with friendships, rivalries, and romance, all while facing a mysterious threat to both the Academy and the Federation.
imageCaption: Kerrice Brooks, Zoë Steiner, George Hawkins, Sandro Rosta, Bella Shepard, and Karim Diane in Star Trek: Starfleet Academy (2026)

name: Gone
plot: Local Headmaster Michael Polly who becomes the prime suspect in his wife Sarah's disappearance when he encounters gutsy Detective Annie Cassidy in a compulsive game of cat and mouse.

name: A Woman of Substance
plot: From servant's quarters to business empire, Emma Harte's indomitable spirit propels her rise from poverty to riches, yearning for one unattainable love.

name: Privileges
plot: Inmate Adèle Charki takes a bellhop job at the Citadel hotel through a day-release program led by director Édouard Galzain. She's caught in power struggles among staff, guests, and networks, while her relationship with Édouard turns dark.

name: Star City
plot: Soviet cosmonauts, engineers, and intelligence officers risk everything in an ambitious space program aiming to be the first to reach the moon.

name: Unfamiliar
plot: Ex-spies Simon and Meret operate a Berlin safe house until a past threat resurfaces. Now they're fleeing hitmen, Russian agents, BND, ex-lovers, and old enemies while trying to save their marriage.

name: Best Medicine
plot: A brilliant surgeon leaves Boston to become a doctor in the small town where he spent childhood summers. Despite his medical skills, his rude manner alienates locals as he battles hidden phobias and struggles with personal connections.

name: Sentenced to Be a Hero
plot: A dark fantasy where criminals are sentenced to carry out heroic acts in a penal military unit, and wage war against a demon king's army.
imageCaption: Sentenced to Be a Hero (2026)

name: Lucky Luke
plot: Lucky Luke must help Louise find her mother, who mysteriously disappeared, while foiling a plot that could change the course of American history.
imageCaption: Lucky Luke (2026)

name: Pursuit of Jade
plot: Changyu Fan and Zheng Xie enter a fake marriage for separate reasons, but their love grows. Separated by conflict, they reunite on the battlefield, fighting together for justice, truth, and their love.

name: The Testaments
plot: This sequel to "The Handmaid's Tale" follows Agnes and Daisy, two teens in Gilead who must navigate an elite preparatory school where obedience is brutally enforced. Their bond becomes the catalyst that will transform their lives.
imageCaption: Lucy Halliday and Chase Infiniti in The Testaments (2026)

name: The Office
plot: Jerónimo Ponce III, regional manager at Olimpo Soaps, terrorizes his staff, who tolerate his offensive remarks just to get through each day.
imageCaption: The Office (2026)

name: The 'Burbs
plot: A young couple moves back to the husband's childhood home, only to face threats from new neighbors and uncover dark secrets of their cul-de-sac.
imageCaption: The 'Burbs (2026)

name: Chiraiya
plot: Kamlesh's world as a devoted wife and daughter-in-law shatters when her new sister-in-law confides a disturbing secret about her wedding night, forcing Kamlesh to confront uncomfortable truths within her own family.

name: Ponies
plot: In 1970s Moscow, two secretaries at the American embassy become CIA operatives after their husbands are killed, uncovering a Cold War conspiracy behind the tragedy.
imageCaption: Emilia Clarke and Haley Lu Richardson in Ponies (2026)

name: Off Campus
plot: A college-set romantic drama chronicling the unexpected love story between a music student and the university's star hockey player, exploring themes of love and the complexities of adulthood through deep friendships and enduring bonds.
imageCaption: Belmont Cameli and Ella Bright in Off Campus (2026)

name: Seeking Persephone
plot: Impoverished Persephone marries reclusive Duke, hoping his wealth rescues her family. She persists in connecting with the man beneath his scarred psyche and imposing estate. Grave peril forces him to risk vulnerability to protect her.

name: Hope Valley: 1874
plot: Follows Rebecca Clarke, who travels from Chicago to the Western Canadian frontier with her 11-year-old daughter but must accept help from local rancher Tom Moore when her wagon breaks down.
imageCaption: Bethany Joy Lenz and Benjamin Ayres in Hope Valley: 1874 (2026)

name: Kaattaan
plot: A man's tale shifts between legend, monster, and miracle based on who tells it.
imageCaption: Vijay Sethupathi in Kaattaan (2026)

name: Neighbors
plot: Examines stories of absurd, outrageous and dramatic real-life residential conflicts from a wide range of larger-than-life characters across the United States, opening a verité portal into the lives of contemporary Americans.
imageCaption: Neighbors (2026)

name: Margo's Got Money Troubles
plot: The young mother finds herself struggling to make ends meet. When her estranged father offers help, she starts an OnlyFans account using his advice from pro wrestling. Though successful, she wonders if internet fame comes at too high cost.

name: The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins
plot: A fallen football player star seeks redemption and a chance to restore his tarnished reputation.

name: Steal
plot: A contemporary, high-octane thriller about the heist of the century and the ordinary office worker who finds herself at the heart of it.
imageCaption: Sophie Turner, Archie Madekwe, and Jacob Fortune-Lloyd in Steal (2026)

name: Crookhaven
plot: Teen thieves learn to use their skills for good at a secret school run by Caspian Lockett. Young pickpocket Gabriel Avery joins The Crooked Network to fight 'The Nameless' and discovers his destiny.

name: Spider-Noir
plot: An aging and down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York is forced to grapple with his past life as the city's one and only superhero.
imageCaption: Nicolas Cage in Spider-Noir (2026)

name: Under Salt Marsh
plot: A detective-turned-teacher investigates a shocking crime in her small town. As a massive storm approaches, she must work with her estranged ex-partner to solve the case before evidence disappears.

name: Small Prophets
plot: Eccentric Michael Sleep, whose darling partner, Clea, disappeared seven years ago, sets out to create Homunculi - magical prophesying spirits that can predict the future.
